value.found_quote: Claude Code in Slack brings the power of Claude Code directly into your Slack workspace. When you mention `@Claude` with a coding task, Claude automatically detects the intent and creates a Claude Code session on the web, allowing you to delegate development work without leaving your team conversations.
value.rationale: The page directly describes Claude Code in Slack, including delegating coding tasks by mentioning @Claude, async/parallel task execution ("Kick off coding tasks in Slack while you continue other work"), context gathering ("Context gathering: From threads... From channels..."), and message actions ("Message actions: View Session, Create PR, Retry as Code, Change Repo"). All claim elements are substantiated. The page presents it as a currently available offering with current limitations, indicating active status.
